title: Boiled and Drained Potatoes
ingredients: ["2 pounds potatoes, peeled and cubed", "1 teaspoon salt", "4 cups water"]
directions: ["Place the cubed potatoes in a pot with 4 cups salted water.", "Boil for 15 minutes until fork tender.", "Drain the potatoes well."]

title: Potato Soup
ingredients: ["2 pounds potatoes, peeled and cubed", "4 cups chicken broth", "1 teaspoon salt", "1 cup milk"]
directions: ["Place the cubed potatoes in a pot with the chicken broth.", "Boil for 20 minutes until tender.", "Stir in the milk and season with salt to make the soup."]

title: Baked Chicken Breast
ingredients: ["4 boneless chicken breasts", "2 tablespoons olive oil", "1 teaspoon black pepper"]
directions: ["Rub the chicken breasts with olive oil and pepper.", "Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes."]

title: Steamed Spinach
directions: ["Steam the spinach for 5 minutes.", "Toss with butter."]

title: Plain Rice
ingredients: ["1 cup rice", "2 cups water", "1/2 teaspoon salt"]
directions: ["Combine the rice, water, and salt in a pot.", "Simmer for 18 minutes until the water is absorbed."]

title: Roasted Carrots
ingredients: ["1 pound carrots, peeled and halved", "1 tablespoon olive oil", "1/2 teaspoon salt"]
directions: ["Toss the halved carrots with olive oil and salt.", "Roast at 425 degrees for 20 minutes."]

title: Sauteed Green Beans
ingredients: ["1 pound green beans, trimmed", "1 tablespoon olive oil", "2 cloves garlic, minced"]
directions: ["Saute the green beans with garlic in olive oil for 8 minutes."]
